text: Paris is the capital of France. The city proper has a population of approximately 2.1 million people, while the greater Paris metropolitan area has about 12.5 million inhabitants.
Hanoi is the capital of Vietnam with approximately 8.4 million residents in its metropolitan area. Ho Chi Minh City is the largest city with over 9 million residents.
Docker containers on the same Docker network can reach each other using the service name as hostname. DNS resolution is handled by Docker's embedded DNS server.
Python's Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) prevents multiple native threads from executing Python bytecode simultaneously. For CPU-bound tasks, use multiprocessing instead of threading.
LangGraph is a framework for building stateful, multi-actor applications with LLMs. It extends LangChain with cycles, controllability, and persistence through StateGraph.
Soy allergy is one of the most common food allergies. Soybeans are found in many processed foods including soy sauce, tofu, tempeh, miso, and edamame. Read labels carefully.
Cow's milk allergy differs from lactose intolerance. Milk allergy is an immune response to milk proteins (casein and whey), while lactose intolerance is a digestive issue with the sugar lactose.
For egg-free pasta, use semolina flour and water only (traditional Italian style). Roll thin, let dry for 15 minutes before cooking in salted boiling water for 2-3 minutes.
Pour-over coffee typically uses a 1:16 coffee-to-water ratio by weight. Water temperature should be 92-96°C. Total brew time 2.5-3 minutes for a 250ml cup.
Redis is an in-memory key-value data store. It supports strings, hashes, lists, sets, and sorted sets. Default port is 6379. Use EXPIRE for TTL-based eviction.
